title: View sub items only
excerpt:

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to create a board view that only shows sub items and be able to filter and or print that view without the main item.

Our use case we have more important info in our sub items and having to print or view the main item is distracting
